data.task_instructions: Read the loaded paper and extract exactly one allele or variant candidate: the Drosophila Notch facet-glossy allele, written as Nfa-g, N^{fa-g}, or similar. Preserve the paper notation, genotype/phenotype context, organism hints, and one record_evidence verified quote. Do not resolve allele IDs in the extractor.

run_finished.response:
The extraction of the Drosophila Notch facet-glossy allele, denoted as **Nfa-g**, has been completed. Here are the details:

- **Allele Notation:** Nfa-g
- **Genotype/Phenotype Context:** The allele is involved in the suppression of transcription of the gene *rst* in pigment cells.
- **Organism Hints:** Drosophila melanogaster
- **Verified Quote:** "Consistently, in N fa-g mutants, rst F6 -lacZ was expanded to all pigment cells surrounding cone cells."
- **Source:** Results section, subsection "4. Notch signaling suppresses transcription of rst and kirre."

This completes the task of extracting the allele from the document.
